text:
The patch result:

$ sudo usbdevs -vd
Controller /dev/usb0:
addr 1: full speed, self powered, config 1, OHCI root hub(0x0000), nVidia(0x0000), rev 1.00
  uhub0
 port 2 addr 4: full speed, self powered, config 1, HP ScanJet 4470c(0x0805), Hewlett-Packard(0x03f0), rev 1.00
   uscanner0

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
